name: projection-on-number
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :ProjectionSubjectNotMap
  :message "/foo requires Map subject, got number"
  :key "foo"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{/foo} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: projection-on-set
distribute-on-number
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :DistributeSubjectNotVec
  :message "* requires Vec subject, got number"
  :operand "*"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{add(1)} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: distribute-on-map
distribute-on-set
merge-on-number

name: use-on-vec
div-by-zero
sum-non-numeric
count-on-number
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :CountSubjectNotContainer
  :message "count requires Vec, Set, or Map subject, got number"
  :operand "count"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec, Set, or Map"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{count} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: vals-on-vec
prepend-modifier-not-string
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :PrependPrefixNotString
  :message "prepend expects String at position 2, got number"
  :operand "prepend"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{prepend(42)} :input "x"}
  :trail null
}

name: append-modifier-not-string
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :AppendSuffixNotString
  :message "append expects String at position 2, got number"
  :operand "append"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{append(42)} :input "x"}
  :trail null
}

name: cannot-apply-args-to-value
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :ApplyToNonFunction
  :message "cannot apply arguments to five: resolves to number, not a function"
  :name "five"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 5
  :fault {:step ~{five(42)} :input 5}
  :trail null
}

name: unresolved-identifier
expect: :UnresolvedIdentifierError

name: unresolved-identifier-fault-step
expect: null

name: unresolved-inside-filter
expect: :UnresolvedIdentifierError
